description_long: This obelisk is a tall, multi-faceted stone monument with a textured, cracked surface resembling weathered masonry. The shaft is octagonal and tapers upward, with golden metallic bands and plates reinforcing its midsection and upper areas, some of which feature engraved runes or symbols. The base is a wide, hexagonal platform with beveled edges, constructed from the same stone material and set atop a patch of grassy terrain with scattered stones. Surrounding the obelisk are several stylized, blue-capped mushrooms of varying heights, adding a whimsical touch to the scene. The obelisk's tip is sharply faceted and unadorned, maintaining the geometric stone motif. The overall appearance suggests a decorative or commemorative function, possibly as a landmark or mystical monument in a park or plaza.
description: A tall, stone obelisk with golden metallic bands and engraved runes, set on a hexagonal base and surrounded by blue mushrooms on grassy terrain.
description_view_0: The obelisk's stone texture and golden bands are prominent, with several blue mushrooms visible on the left and right sides of the base.
description_view_1: This view highlights a large blue mushroom directly in front of the obelisk, with the golden bands and engraved runes clearly visible.
description_view_2: The obelisk's rear side is shown, with more visible runes on the golden bands and a cluster of mushrooms to the left.
description_view_3: A large blue mushroom is centered in front of the obelisk, with the golden bands and runes visible, and fewer mushrooms on the right.
attribute_inscription: Engraved runes or symbols are visible on the golden metallic bands on the upper shaft, featuring a stylized, possibly fictional script. The inscriptions are vertically aligned and moderately legible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative golden metallic bands and plates encircle the shaft, with engraved runes on some bands. No additional carvings or reliefs are present.
attribute_base_design: The base is a wide, hexagonal stone platform with beveled edges and a cracked, weathered texture. It sits atop a patch of grassy terrain with scattered stones, providing stability and visual contrast.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply faceted, tapering to a point, and is unadorned, maintaining the geometric stone motif without additional decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: Several stylized blue-capped mushrooms of varying heights are positioned around the base, set on a grassy, stone-studded terrain.
